alkylation reagent: 5 μL of 375 mM freshly prepared 2-iodoacetamide was added
alkylation concentration: 5 μL of 375 mM freshly prepared 2-iodoacetamide was added
cleavage agent: 2 μg of LysC dissolved in 1% formic acid was added.
collision energy: Having established the optimal NCE at 28
fragmentation method: The CID-cleavable Ac-IPG tag targets the ε-amino group

reduction reagent: 5 μL of 200 mM TCEP was added
reduction concentration: 5 μL of 200 mM TCEP was added
